meta.title: Attachment Style
meta.description: Discover your attachment pattern in romantic relationships
meta.descriptionKo: 연애 관계에서 당신의 애착 패턴을 알아보세요

options.text: Feel comfortable depending on my partner
Worry my partner doesn't love me enough
options.textKo: 파트너가 나를 충분히 사랑하지 않을까 걱정된다

options.text: Prefer to be independent rather than relying on others
Want closeness but feel uncomfortable getting it

questions.text: When my partner needs space, I...
questions.textKo: 파트너가 혼자만의 시간이 필요할 때, 나는...

options.text: Understand and give them space
Feel anxious and worry they're pulling away
Feel relieved — I also need my own space
options.textKo: 오히려 안도된다 - 나도 혼자만의 시간이 필요하다

options.text: Feel confused and hurt, unsure what to do
options.textKo: 혼란스럽고 상처받은 느낌이 들어 어떻게 해야 할지 모른다

options.text: Easy to be emotionally close to others
Easy to get emotionally close but hard to trust it'll last
Difficult to allow myself to depend on others
Uncomfortable both getting close and staying independent
options.textKo: 가까워지는 것도 독립적인 것도 모두 불편하다

questions.text: When I think about my relationship, I usually feel...
questions.textKo: 연인 관계를 떠올릴 때, 나는 보통...

options.text: Confident and secure
Anxious about whether I am loved
Neutral — I try not to think about it too much
A mix of wanting connection and fearing rejection
Calmly discuss and work towards resolution
Get upset and need constant reassurance
Withdraw and need time alone to process
Feel overwhelmed and shut down emotionally
Worthy of love and lovable
Someone who needs validation to feel worthy
Self-sufficient and not needing much from others
options.textKo: 다른 사람에게 많이 의지하지 않는 자립적인 사람으로 생각한다

options.text: Someone who struggles with self-worth

questions.text: When my partner shows affection, I...

options.text: Feel happy and reciprocate naturally
Feel happy but still worry it might not last
Feel a little smothered or overwhelmed
Feel good but also scared of getting too attached

questions.text: If a relationship ends, I typically...

options.text: Grieve, learn from it, and move forward
Have a very hard time letting go
Move on quickly without much emotional distress
Feel relieved but also deeply lonely
Balanced — giving and receiving equally
Deep, intense, and always connected
Comfortable with plenty of personal space
options.textKo: 개인 공간이 충분히 보장되는 편안한 관계

options.text: Emotionally safe enough for me to truly open up
options.textKo: 진심으로 마음을 열 수 있을 만큼 안전한 관계

questions.text: When I haven't heard from my partner for a while, I...
questions.textKo: 파트너에게 오래 연락이 없을 때, 나는...

options.text: Trust they're just busy
Feel anxious and check my phone often
Not really notice or mind much
Worry something is wrong but hesitate to reach out
options.textKo: 뭔가 잘못됐을까 걱정되지만 먼저 연락하기가 망설여진다

questions.text: Emotional intimacy in relationships makes me feel...

options.text: Safe and connected
Like I need to hold on tight
Uncomfortable and want to pull back
Both good and scary at the same time

questions.text: I communicate my needs to my partner...
questions.textKo: 파트너에게 내 필요를 표현할 때, 나는...

options.text: Openly and directly
Sometimes, but worry about being too needy
options.textKo: 가끔 말하지만 너무 의존하는 것 같아 걱정된다

options.text: Rarely — I prefer to handle things myself
options.textKo: 거의 안 한다 - 혼자 해결하는 것이 낫다

options.text: Find it very difficult to ask for what I need
Something I build naturally over time
Something I constantly have to check and verify
Something I have difficulty fully giving
Something I deeply want but struggle to maintain

questions.text: When thinking about commitment, I feel...
questions.textKo: 진지한 관계에 대해 생각할 때, 나는...

options.text: Excited and ready
Hopeful but worried it won't work out
A bit hesitant — I value my freedom
Conflicted — I want it but also fear it
Being present, warm, and attentive
options.textKo: 옆에 있어 주고, 따뜻하고 세심하게 대한다

options.text: Doing everything I can to make them happy
options.textKo: 상대를 행복하게 하기 위해 무엇이든 한다

options.text: Giving them space and practical support
options.textKo: 개인 공간을 존중하고 실질적인 도움을 준다

options.text: Small gestures, but struggle with grand declarations
options.textKo: 작은 행동으로 표현하지만 대담한 고백은 어렵다

questions.text: If I sense my partner is pulling away, I...

options.text: Talk to them calmly about what's going on
Panic and try harder to get their attention
Give them space and wait to see what happens
Withdraw myself in self-protection

results.title: Secure Attachment
results.description: You feel comfortable with intimacy and are generally positive about yourself and others in relationships.
results.descriptionKo: 당신은 친밀감에 편안함을 느끼며, 관계에서 자신과 상대방에 대해 긍정적인 태도를 가집니다. 감정을 건강하게 표현하고 필요할 때 도움을 요청할 수 있으며, 파트너에게 의지하면서도 독립성을 유지합니다.

results.title: Anxious Attachment
results.description: You crave closeness but worry about whether your partner really loves you or will leave you.
results.descriptionKo: 당신은 가까움을 갈망하지만 파트너가 진정으로 당신을 사랑하는지, 혹은 떠날지 걱정합니다. 관계에서 강렬한 감정을 경험하며, 종종 파트너의 반응에 매우 민감하게 반응합니다.

results.title: Avoidant Attachment
results.description: You value independence highly and tend to pull back when relationships feel too close.
results.descriptionKo: 당신은 독립성을 매우 중요하게 여기며, 관계가 너무 가까워질 때 물러나는 경향이 있습니다. 감정적 친밀감에 불편함을 느끼며, 자립적인 태도를 유지합니다.

results.title: Fearful-Avoidant Attachment
results.description: You want close relationships but find them frightening. You have mixed feelings about intimacy.
results.descriptionKo: 당신은 친밀한 관계를 원하지만 동시에 두려움을 느낍니다. 가까워지고 싶은 욕구와 멀어지고 싶은 욕구가 공존하며, 관계에서 혼란스러운 감정을 자주 경험합니다.
